login.pageDescription: Sign in and see what's happening at the cottage.

errors.invalidCredentials: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong while signing you in. Please try again.

signup.pageDescription: Create your account and get the whole family on the same page.
signup.successPendingConfirmation: Account created. Check your email to confirm your sign-up before continuing.

errors.displayNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong while creating the account. Please try again.

home.metaDescription: Stays, supplies, tasks, and notes — all together for the whole family.
home.eyebrow: Cottage management for the whole family
home.title: Everything about the cottage, in one place.
home.description: Stays, supplies, tasks, and notes — all together and accessible to everyone.
home.supportingCopy: Works well on mobile and desktop, with fewer ownership mix-ups.

visits.title: Calendar
visits.description: See who's coming and when — everyone's plans in one calendar.

shopping.title: Supplies
shopping.description: One shared list. Everyone knows what's missing and what's covered.

tasks.title: To-dos
tasks.description: Cottage tasks in one view. Nothing important slips through.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Short notes from visits that don't get lost between stays.

overview.pageDescription: A quick read on who is at the cottage, what needs attention, and what changed recently.

presence.currentTitle: Someone is at the cottage now
presence.emptyTitle: No one is scheduled there now
presence.currentDescription: Current stays are shown first so the family can see who is using the cottage today.
presence.nextDescription: No active stay is scheduled today, so the next visit is the most useful handoff signal.
presence.emptyDescription: There is no active or upcoming stay on the calendar yet.
presence.currentBadge: {count, plural, one {# current stay} other {# current stays}}
presence.noVisitDescription: Add the next visit when someone knows the dates.

weather.title: Weather
weather.unavailableDescription: The latest conditions could not be loaded right now.

summary.visits: {count, plural, =0 {No one there now} one {# current stay now} other {# current stays now}}
summary.tasks: {count, plural, =0 {No overdue work} one {# overdue task} other {# overdue tasks}}
summary.shopping: {count, plural, =0 {Nothing missing} one {# item still missing} other {# items still missing}}

tasks.title: Upcoming tasks
tasks.emptyDescription: There is no cottage work waiting right now.

shopping.title: Missing essentials
shopping.emptyDescription: Nothing is currently marked as missing.

notes.title: Latest notes
notes.emptyDescription: Recent handoff notes will appear here.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: The dashboard content could not be loaded.

tasks.pageDescription: Keep cottage work visible, actionable, and easy to finish.

open.title: Open To-dos
open.description: Everything that still needs attention, with overdue work grouped first when it needs action.
open.emptyDescription: Everything important is done. Feel free to add more work.

overdue.title: Needs attention first
overdue.description: Open tasks that are already past due and should be closed or rescheduled first.
overdue.emptyDescription: Great! Whenever something is late, it will appear here.

onTrack.title: Still on track
onTrack.description: The rest of the open work that is still on time.
onTrack.emptyDescription: Only overdue work is left right now.

done.title: Completed
done.description: Closed tasks, ordered from newest to oldest.
done.emptyDescription: Once you complete something, it will appear here.

form.title: Add Task
form.supportingCopy: Add the task, an optional due date, and the context someone will need to finish it without guessing.

errors.titleMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
errors.notAuthenticated: You need to sign in to continue
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do this

form.submitHint: New tasks appear back in your open list right after saving.

notes.pageDescription: Capture handoff details, important updates, and anything the next person should know before arriving.

sections.notesDescription: Team notes ordered newest first, so the most recent updates stay easy to scan.

form.title: Add note
form.supportingCopy: Save a short update or handoff detail. New notes appear at the top of the list right after saving.

fields.contentPlaceholder: What happened at the cottage, what needs to be known...
fields.photosHint: Add a few photos when visual context helps the next person.
fields.photoRequirements: Up to {maxCount} JPG, PNG, or WebP files, {maxSizeMb} MB each.

errors.photosTooMany: You can attach up to 4 photos
errors.photoInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, and WebP files are supported
errors.photoTooLarge: Each photo must be 6 MB or smaller

form.submitHint: Keep it short and specific so the next person can act on it quickly.

errors.photoUploadFailed: Failed to upload the selected photos
errors.photoSaveFailed: Failed to attach the selected photos to the note
errors.notAuthenticated: You need to sign in to continue

errors.notAuthenticated: You need to sign in to continue
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do this

empty.noNotesDescription: Important updates, reminders, and handoff details will show up here.

shopping.pageDescription: Keep the shared cottage supplies list current so everyone can see what is still missing and what has already been brought.

pending.title: To buy
pending.description: Items that still need to be picked up before the next stay or handoff.
pending.emptyDescription: The list is clear for now. Add anything new as soon as it comes up.

purchased.title: Bought
purchased.description: Items that have already been picked up, so the team can quickly confirm what is already at the cottage.
purchased.emptyDescription: As soon as something is marked brought, it will show up here.

summary.title: Supplies overview
summary.description: Keep the active list and brought items separated so handoffs stay easy to scan.

form.title: Add supply item
form.supportingCopy: Add one clear item so the next person can pick it up without guessing. New items return to the active list right after saving.
form.submitHint: New items appear back in the active list after saving.

errors.notAuthenticated: You need to sign in to continue
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do this

calendar.gridHint: Use arrow keys, Home, and End to move between days. Press Enter or Space to select a day.
calendar.selectedDayHint: Select a day, then add a visit when you're ready.
calendar.selectedDayHintEditing: Draft is open. Click or tap another day to move it. On desktop, hold Shift to extend the stay.
calendar.selectedDayHintReadOnly: Review visits for this day or move to another date in the calendar.
calendar.chooseDayDescription: Select a day in this week to review scheduled visits or add a new one.
calendar.noVisitsDescription: Nothing is scheduled for this day yet.
calendar.noVisitsDescriptionEditing: Choose dates in the form, or keep using the calendar to adjust the draft.
calendar.noVisitsDescriptionReadOnly: Select another day to review more scheduled visits.
calendar.noPeriodVisitsDescription: Move to another month or add a new visit from the calendar.
calendar.visitsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No visits} one {# visit} other {# visits}}
calendar.visitsCountShort: {count, plural, =0 {0 visits} one {# visit} other {# visits}}

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: The page could not be loaded. Please try again, or head back to the home page.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist, or it has moved.

demo.banner: Demo mode — data resets on reload
